rows.label: tev016501_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Kiefer about Leland's Blue Blood.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016501_MSG0001
rows.name:
One day he just came home looking
like that. Even his oldest
acquaintances were taken aback.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016501_MSG0002
rows.name:
Mom was totally creeped out
at having a husband who looked
younger than her own son.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016501_MSG0003
rows.name:
They broke up as soon as we
arrived on Mira. Now it's just
the two of us living together.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016501_MSG0004
rows.name:
Nevertheless, Dad doesn't seem to
regret it one bit. I gotta admit,
I kind of admire that about him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016501_MSG0005
rows.name:
Always finish the job, no matter
what—that's Cole Family Rule Number
Two. Pretty straightforward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016501_MSG0008
rows.name:
The other day, Iriina told me that as
long as she lived, she'd never understand
the way me and my father operate.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016501_MSG0009
rows.name:
My father and I may be family, but we're
still our own people. She just doesn't seem
to get that way of thinking, I guess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016501_MSG0010
rows.name:
That caused me to ask what Iriina's
family was like, but as soon as I
did, she got strangely quiet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016501_MSG0011
rows.name:
Then she whispered something about how
she would have wanted to save her
family even if it cost her own life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev016501_MSG0012
rows.name:
She seemed pretty upset about it. Do
you think I shouldn't have asked?[ST:wait ]
